pattern.imageEvidence: craftsperson refinishing a wooden furniture piece in a tidy workshop with tools and finish samples
pattern.styleContract: Patient and tactile with material proof, real refinishing evidence, steel-indigo and brass accent behavior, and a hero photo proof pair plus restoration trust quote as the signature move.

tagline: Furniture repair with grain, care, and receipts.

hero.title: GrainMend furniture refinishing hero image
hero.alt: A craftsperson refinishing a wooden furniture piece in a tidy workshop with sanding block, brush, clamps, and wood samples.

contact.serviceArea: Furniture refinishing, chair repair, table restoration, finish refreshes, small cabinet repair, heirloom care, photo estimates, and pickup or drop-off guidance for River Market, Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and Maple Bend

copy.heroTitle: Bring the piece back without losing its story.
copy.heroText: GrainMend repairs worn edges, tired finishes, wobbly joints, and beloved wood pieces with a practical photo estimate and a finish plan you can understand.
copy.introTitle: A good refinish respects the piece before it starts shining.
copy.introText: We look at wood type, finish condition, structural issues, sentimental value, timeline, and whether repair or full refinishing is the better path.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to send a furniture photo?
copy.quoteText: Start with clear photos, dimensions, damage notes, and what you hope the piece becomes. We will reply with the likely repair path and next step.

services.title: Finish Refresh
services.text: Clean, scuff, tone, and protect pieces that need life back without a full strip-down.

services.title: Repair And Stabilize
services.text: Loose joints, worn edges, missing pulls, small veneer issues, and structural fixes before the finish work.

services.title: Full Refinish
services.text: A deeper reset for tables, chairs, dressers, and heirloom pieces that need a new finish plan.

process.title: Send the piece
process.text: Clear photos, dimensions, damage, finish goals, and any sentimental constraints help us triage.

process.title: Choose the repair path
process.text: We explain refresh, repair, or refinish options before quoting the next step.

process.title: Restore and care
process.text: The piece is repaired, finished, cured, and handed back with care notes.

notes: Works: a hero photo proof pair plus floating send-photo panel. gives the page a memorable shape.

brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic before-after-quote recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: Photo estimate: repair path scoped before pickup.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send 3 to 5 photos of the furniture refinishing and repair service item, dimensions, close-up damage, finish goals, loose-joint notes, pickup or drop-off needs, and timing window.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Clear photos, dimensions, damage, finish goals, and any sentimental constraints help us triage.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Photo-to-plan flow for Furniture refinishing, chair repair, table restoration, finish refreshes, small cabinet repair, heirloom care, photo estimates, and pickup or drop-off guidance for River Market, Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and Maple Bend: first the condition evidence, then material risk, finish goals, timing, and pickup or drop-off notes.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For furniture refinishing and repair service, condition photos, dimensions, finish goals, loose joints, and sentimental constraints decide whether the repair path is simple or needs a closer look.
